rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Clearly a header with no monetary amounts. Aligned to the center of the page.

rows.description: Pd Mr Grignier a Year Due at mic: 1731
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus (2 0 0). Description taken from gemini-flash after visual verification ('Grignier', 'mic:' are clearly written, gpt-5-mini had 'Guignier' and 'Mid:').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Grignier of a year's dues falling at Michaelmas 1731.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Grignier of a year's dues falling at Michaelmas 1731, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pd for Labourers Work in clearing & Digging the Back Court
rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on the amount for this row. Visual inspection shows the raw amount as '3 2 16'. gemini-flash correctly identified the raw pence value as '16o' (interpreting 'o' as 'd' for pence) and applied the validation rule: 16 pence converts to 1 shilling and 4 pence. This 1 shilling was correctly added to the existing 2 shillings, resulting in 3 pounds, 3 shillings, and 4 pence. gpt-5-mini reported no amount due to perceived ambiguity, which was incorrect upon visual verification. gemini-flash's detailed note and correct rule application are highly trustworthy.
rows.english_description: Payment for labourers' work clearing and digging the Back Court.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for labourers' work clearing and digging the Back Court, amounting to £3 3s 4d.

rows.description: Pd for two Buttary Books
rows.notes: Extractors disagreed on the amount (gemini-flash: 0 5 0; gpt-5-mini: 0 2 5) and description spelling. Visual verification confirms the amount is '0 5 0' (pounds, shillings, pence) and the description is 'Buttary Books'. gemini-flash's reading of the amounts and description spelling is correct. gpt-5-mini's note indicates uncertainty regarding digit placement, which was resolved by direct image inspection.
